decisions.question: Freshness re-validation hook point and mechanism

cross_validation_notes: Decisions are mutually consistent and share one spine: the two-store split by lifetime (permanent SHA-aware handled-set + GC'd StagedRecord with session refs). D2 needs the session/conv id in the record; D1 adds it. D4's cap counts live records and introduces staged-record GC; D1 depends on that GC to bound record growth; D3's watcher-pass prune IS the GC trigger. D2's resume is cap-neutral (D4). No conflicts. The one cross-cutting risk (both stores grow monotonically) is resolved by the shared staged-record GC that D3 (freshness prune) and D4 (dead-record prune) both feed.
